name: GBU-39 SDB
description: GBU-39 Small Diameter Bomb. 250 lb GPS-guided glide weapon — deployable wings give it ~10:1 glide ratio so a high-altitude toss release reaches well over 100 km. Tiny warhead (focused-blast 25 lb, ~15 m kill radius) — surgical strike on hardened targets, not area suppression. Quad-pack carriage means a strike fighter can hold many of them on a single hardpoint (we model them per-pylon for now).
